name: Achieng W.
text: Found a Plaid wool overcoat for 2,400 that would've cost me 9k brand new. Quality is honestly better than most new stuff I've bought. Thrifter is my go-to now.

name: Brian K.
text: The M-Pesa checkout was so smooth, paid and got a confirmation in seconds. Jacket arrived exactly as pictured.

name: Naomi M.
text: Love the wishlist feature, I save pieces and wait for restocks. The wrap dress I got was barely worn, smelled fresh too.

name: Kevin O.
text: Got my daughter the denim overalls for a fraction of retail. She's already outgrowing clothes every few months so this is a lifesaver.
